articles.title: Adani Energy Solutions Q1 results 2026: Net profit soars 124% to  ₹1,149 crore; revenue climbs 42%
articles.excerpt: Adani Energy Solutions reported a 124.22% rise in Q1 FY27 net profit to ₹1,149 crore, compared to ₹512.48 crore last year. Revenue surged 42.41% year-on-year to ₹9,711.08 crore during the quarter ended June 2026.
articles.summary: Adani Energy Solutions reported a 124.22% rise in Q1 FY27 net profit to ₹1,149 crore, compared to ₹512.48 crore last year. Revenue surged 42.41% year-on-year to ₹9,711.08 crore during the quarter ended June 2026.
